ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the comment */,
  "is_toxic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is toxic */,
  "logged_in" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user was logged in when commenting */,
  "namespace" TEXT /* Namespace of the comment (user or article) */,
  "revision_id" REAL /* Revision identifier of the comment */,
  "sample" TEXT /* Sample status (random or blocked) */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split designation for analysis (e.g., train, test) */,
  "toxicity_score" INTEGER /* Calculated toxicity score of the comment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for replies) */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last updated */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been deleted */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment in the moderation process (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* User's biography or about section */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A score representing the user's overall engagement level on the platform */,
  "is_moderator" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toxicity_scores" (
  "toxicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each toxicity score record */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Range of the toxicity score (e.g., 0-1, 1-3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the toxicity level */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the toxicity (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if action is required based on the toxicity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("toxicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that was moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., reviewed, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the moderation action (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment at the time of moderation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the moderator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the moderator */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of moderation access (e.g., junior, senior) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the moderator's last activity */,
  "total_actions" INTEGER /* Total number of moderation actions taken by the moderator */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the moderator is an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the comment */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being engaged with */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, report) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A score representing the user's engagement level with the specific comment */,
  "is_positive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the engagement is positive (e.g., like, share) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., comment, article) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken by the user (e.g., view, comment) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was from a bot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
